title: SUPERDANT Snow Girl Metal Tin Signs Gift Metal Sign Loves Christmas Tin Sign Plaque Retro Metal Poster for Christmas Party Home Living Room Bars Cafes Pubs Decorations
features: Snow Girl Tin Sign:: 1 pieces of iron-made tin sign art in Christmas theme, a little girl in a red jacket in the snow, with a present in her hand, who looked so happy, with the qoutes "just a girl who loves Christmas".

Indoor & Outdoor Christmas Decorations: Vintage style metal tin signs add Christmas cheer to every room in your home, bar, or office. Offer an ideal possibility to bring taste and personality to the privacy of your home.

Size: The tin sign is about 8x12in/20x30cm. The material stands for quality and endurance and the tin sign design stands out against alternatives like posters or plastic products. You can use it alone or with other tin paintings.
Easy to Use & Durable: The vintage art signs are made of quality iron that can be used for a long time. Mounting holes on each of the 4 corners for versatile mounting options.

Gift Choices: It’s suitable for many places, such as dining room, bar, cafe, billiard house, hotel, club wall decoration, creating contracted but fashionable atmosphere as absolutely a wonderful gift for your families, friends, colleagues and relatives for Christmas or any time.
description: Product Description Vintage design, creative, contracted, fashionable,an ideal gift for friends. Great for Indoors or Outdoors.It can be placed on a countertop or hung on a wall. 4 small pre-drilled holes , can be mounted on the wall by nails on 4 corners or double-sided tape What may you like?
